narration: Science has a clearer story about Type Ia supernovae than social media does.
visual_description: Hook visual: Science has a clearer story about Type Ia supernovae than social media does.
ai_image_prompt: Hook visual: Science has a clearer story about Type Ia supernovae than social media does.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Hook visual: Science has a clearer story about Type Ia supernovae than social media does.

narration: These explosions occur in binary star systems when a white dwarf siphons material from its companion.
visual_description: Context visual: These explosions occur in binary star systems when a white dwarf siphons material from its companion.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: These explosions occur in binary star systems when a white dwarf siphons material from its companion.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: These explosions occur in binary star systems when a white dwarf siphons material from its companion.

narration: Once it reaches a critical mass, boom! A supernova erupts, shining brighter than entire galaxies.
visual_description: Escalation visual: Once it reaches a critical mass, boom! A supernova erupts, shining brighter than entire galaxies.
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: Once it reaches a critical mass, boom! A supernova erupts, shining brighter than entire galaxies.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: Once it reaches a critical mass, boom! A supernova erupts, shining brighter than entire galaxies.

narration: Type Ia supernovae are crucial for measuring cosmic distances, acting as reliable 'standard candles'.
visual_description: Evidence visual: Type Ia supernovae are crucial for measuring cosmic distances, acting as reliable 'standard candles'.
ai_image_prompt: Evidence visual: Type Ia supernovae are crucial for measuring cosmic distances, acting as reliable 'standard candles'.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Evidence visual: Type Ia supernovae are crucial for measuring cosmic distances, acting as reliable 'standard candles'.

narration: But there’s still uncertainty! Variations in their brightness can puzzle scientists.
visual_description: Payoff visual: But there’s still uncertainty! Variations in their brightness can puzzle scientists.

ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Payoff visual: But there’s still uncertainty! Variations in their brightness can puzzle scientists.
